fields.description: Registered worker (Employee) who boarded. Leave blank and tick 'Unregistered' for a contractor/temp hire not on the request manifest.
fields.label: Worker

fields.description: Tick for a contractor/temp hire not registered on the trip's worker manifest.
fields.label: Unregistered

fields.description: Identifier (e.g. Iqama/contractor id) for an unregistered worker.
fields.label: Contractor / Temp ID

fields.description: The route stop where this worker boarded (mirrors the Route Stop name on the trip's route).
fields.label: Stop

fields.description: The housing pickup (Habitat) for this boarding, when the stop is a worker accommodation. The Habitat-Salis bridge.
fields.label: Pickup Building
